greeting: ^Ancient Elder: Greetings, wanderer. Few dare to enter the Crypt of Shadows.
^Ancient Elder: The darkness here is ancient. Respect it, and perhaps it will spare you.
post_prologue: ^Ancient Elder: You have witnessed the shadows stir. The seals weaken.
^Ancient Elder: Seek the three altar stones on each floor. They hold the crypt together.
descent_advice: ^Ancient Elder: The deeper floors are treacherous. Undead grow stronger with each level.
^Ancient Elder: Stock up on antidotes — the lower crypts breathe poison.
